$comment: Familiar species (design doc S4). The small flock is made of individuals: each familiar is drawn from a species with a role lean, a pool of suggested names (the player names it on arrival, renameable later), and a fixed, authored powerup pool (deterministic per species at MVP — the Rite generator can rely on what any crew can become). Every 5 levels a familiar offers a choice of 2-3 unlocked powerups from its species pool, kept for the run. Powerup kinds: nodeYieldBonus (its node; optional resource narrows it), trailThroughputBonus (when it holds the trail post), pristineBonus (points at its node), digSpeedBonus (at a dig site), offlineBonus (its post's offline earnings). Values are first guesses.

powerups.name: Patient digger
powerups.description: +40% dig speed at a dig site

powerups.name: Deep pockets
powerups.description: +25% throughput when it holds the trail post

powerups.name: Tireless wings
powerups.description: +15% throughput when it holds the trail post
